zh.lifeSummary: 當Ingeborg of Mecklenburg於1336年出生時，她的父親Albrecht II "der Große" Herzog von Mecklenburg-Schwerin18歲，母親Eufemia Eriksdotter19歲。她於1366年與Heinrich II von Holstein在格洛斯黑爾左圖姆 梅可倫波-史維林斯塔特 史維林結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1395年7月25日享年59歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ingeborg of Mecklenburg于1336年出生时，她的父亲Albrecht II "der Große" Herzog von Mecklenburg-Schwerin18岁，母亲Eufemia Eriksdotter19岁。她于1366年与Heinrich II von Holstein在格洛斯黑爾左圖姆 梅可倫波-史維林斯塔特 史維林结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1395年7月25日享年59岁。

nameMeanings.name: Ingeborg
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old Norse personal name from the name of the fertility god Ing + borg ‘fortification’.

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Oswald or any of the various other names beginning with Os-.

nameMeanings.name: Mecklenburg
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name from the province of this name in northern Germany, so called from Old Saxon mikil ‘big, great’ + burg ‘castle’. Amongst Jews this may have been acquired alternatively as an artificial name.

variants.name: Mekelburg
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Gerhard, Helmut.
German: variant of Meckelburg, itself a variant of Mecklenburg .

en.lifeSummary: When Ingeborg of Mecklenburg was born in 1336, her father, Albrecht II "der Große" Herzog von Mecklenburg-Schwerin, was 18 and her mother, Eufemia Eriksdotter, was 19. She married Heinrich II von Holstein in 1366, in Schwerin, Mecklenburg-Schwerin. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 25 July 1395, at the age of 59.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ingeborg of Mecklenburg est née en 1336, son père, Albrecht II "der Große" Herzog von Mecklenburg-Schwerin, avait 18 ans et sa mère, Eufemia Eriksdotter, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé Heinrich II von Holstein en 1366, à Stadt Schwerin, Großherzogtum Mecklenburg-Schwerin. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 25 juillet 1395, à l’âge de 59 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ingeborg of Mecklenburg 1336 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Albrecht II "der Große" Herzog von Mecklenburg-Schwerin 18 und ihre Mutter Eufemia Eriksdotter 19. Sie hat 1366 in Stadt Schwerin, Großherzogtum Mecklenburg-Schwerin Heinrich II von Holstein geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 25. Juli 1395 im Alter von 59 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ingeborg of Mecklenburg è nata il nel 1336, sua padre, Albrecht II "der Große" Herzog von Mecklenburg-Schwerin, aveva 18 anni e sua madre, Eufemia Eriksdotter, aveva 19 anni. Lei sposato Heinrich II von Holstein nel 1366, nel Stadt Schwerin, Großherzogtum Mecklenburg-Schwerin. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 25 luglio 1395, all'età di 59 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Ingeborg of Mecklenburgが1336年に生まれた時，父Albrecht II "der Große" Herzog von Mecklenburg-Schwerinは18歳，母Eufemia Eriksdotterは19歳であった。1366年にグロssハーゾグトゥム メックレンブルグ-スチウエリンスタト スチウエリンでHeinrich II von Holsteinと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1395年7月25日に59歳で死去した。

ko.Schleswig, Schleswig, Schleswig-Holstein: 독일 플레우ss 슐레스위그-홀스타인 크레이스 슐레스위그 슐레스위그
ko.lifeSummary: Ingeborg of Mecklenburg(이)가 1336년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Albrecht II "der Große" Herzog von Mecklenburg-Schwerin(은)는 18세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Eufemia Eriksdotter(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 1366년 그로ss헤어즈그투 클렌버그-슈워인 스타드트 슈워인에서 Heinrich II von Holstein(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1395년 7월 25일 59세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ingeborg of Mecklenburg nasceu em 1336, seu pai, Albrecht II "der Große" Herzog von Mecklenburg-Schwerin, tinha 18 anos e sua mãe, Eufemia Eriksdotter, tinha 19 anos. Ela casou-se com Heinrich II von Holstein em 1366, em Stadt Schwerin, Großherzogtum Mecklenburg-Schwerin. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 25 de julho de 1395, com 59 anos.

ru.Schleswig, Schleswig, Schleswig-Holstein: щлесвиг, крис щлесвиг, щлесвиг-холстин, Пруссия, Германия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ingeborg of Mecklenburg родилась в 1336 г., её отцу по имени Albrecht II "der Große" Herzog von Mecklenburg-Schwerin было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Eufemia Eriksdotter, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Heinrich II von Holstein в 1366 г. в местности стадт щвирин, гроssхирзогтум меккленбург-щвирин. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 25 июля 1395 г. в возрасте 59 лет.

Se casó con Heinrich II von Holstein en 1366, en Stadt Schwerin, Großherzogtum Mecklenburg-Schwerin. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 25 de julio de 1395, a la edad de 59 años.
